nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Dusky-capped greenlet
nodes.summary: Dusky-capped greenlet（Dusky-capped greenlet，学名 Pachysylvia hypoxantha），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dusky-capped greenlet (Pachysylvia hypoxantha) is a species of bird in the family Vireonidae, the vireos, greenlets, and shrike-babblers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: inornata: northern Brazil south of the Amazon from the Tapajós River east to the Tocantins River The dusky-capped greenlet inhabits humid terra firme and várzea forest, where it favors the subcanopy and canopy. In Brazil it ranges in elevation from near sea level to . It reaches in Colombia, is mostly below in Ecuador, and reaches in Peru and at least and probably higher in Venezuela.{{cite book | last =Ridgely | first =Robert S
